notes: Spec asserts two bullets: (1) session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms — vibe's CommandPattern-matched proc-<PID> pre-session row satisfies both, independent of when messages.jsonl materializes. Observations assert model (mistral-medium-3.5, confirmed from live sidecars, passes NormalizeModelName unchanged) + tokens_nonzero (sidecar context_tokens on turn_done); cost is NOT asserted (daemon emits no per-turn cost for vibe).

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
